description: In this episode of Chewing Glass, Dean M. Little discusses his journey into software engineering, starting from a young age with programming a Z80. He shares insights on his education, self-taught experiences, and his work with the Solana ecosystem and Zeus Network, which aims to integrate Bitcoin with Solana.
topic_summary: Dean M. Little's background in software engineering, his educational journey, and his current projects in the Solana ecosystem, including his role at Zeus Network [t=66.33].
